name: Fried Fish
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Milk, or more as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut fish fillets in half, making triangular shapes.
2. Cover with milk and lemon juice, then refrigerate for 3-4 hours.
3. Drain off the milk.
4. Dip fillets in flour to coat each piece lightly.
5. Let them dry on a cookie sheet, ensuring pieces do not become tough.
6. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy pan to at least 425°F.
7. Combine pancake mix, basil, pepper, garlic salt, and enough soda to make a thick batter with the consistency of buttermilk.
8. Dip floured fillets in batter and add them to the hot oil one at a time.
9. Fry for 4-5 minutes.
10. Remove fillets to a cookie sheet, ensuring they do not touch each other. Keep warm in an oven set to 250°F.
11. Deep fry remaining fillets, maintaining the depth of oil at least 3 inches. Note: Do not heap fish as this creates steam and makes coating soft.
